issue-plan.description: Create an implementation plan for a single issue without editing files
issue-plan.template:
Read the issue text below and create a scoped implementation plan. Include affected files, contracts, tests, risks, and a step-by-step checklist. Do not edit files.

Issue:
$ARGUMENTS

issue-build.description: Implement a single issue with tests
issue-build.template:
Implement this issue only. Follow AGENTS.md. Add or update tests. Run focused tests and report results.

Issue:
$ARGUMENTS

review.description: Review current changes against project rules and test requirements
review.template: Review the current diff for correctness, test coverage, contract compatibility, security, and issue scope. Do not edit files.

test.description: Run full test verification and summarize failures
test.template: Run the relevant test suite. If tests fail, identify root causes and propose minimal fixes. Do not broaden scope.

gh-issue.description: Create a GitHub issue plan and gh issue create command
gh-issue.template:
Create a GitHub issue plan for this task. Propose title, labels, scope, acceptance criteria, required tests, and the exact `gh issue create` command. Do not edit product code.

Task:
$ARGUMENTS

gh-pr.description: Prepare a PR body and preflight checklist for the current branch
gh-pr.template:
Prepare this branch for a GitHub PR. Check the diff against AGENTS.md, verify issue scope, summarize tests run, and produce a PR body that satisfies `.github/pull_request_template.md`.

Context:
$ARGUMENTS

ci-fix.description: Analyze CI failures and propose/implement minimal fixes
ci-fix.template:
Analyze CI failures for the current branch. Use the smallest possible change to fix the failing check. Do not broaden the issue scope. Re-run the focused test command and summarize the result.

Failure context:
$ARGUMENTS
